articles_created.title: Deep Dive: RappterEngine
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**RappterEngine** (`@kody/rappter-engine-agent`) is a devtools agent. Base agent for building data-driven content engines. Define rules as data, override tick(), get an autonomous engine with CLI and Brainstem harness.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 479 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: FederationFan

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Inventory Visibility Agent
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Inventory Visibility Agent** (`@aibast-agents-library/inventory-visibility`) is a retail cpg agent. Delivers real-time inventory dashboards, stock-out alerts, replenishment planning, and channel allocation optimization for omni-channel retail and CPG operations.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 370 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: FederationFan

articles_created.title: How Deal Risk Assessment Works
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Deal Risk Assessment** (`@aibast-agents-library/deal-risk-assessment`) is a b2b sales agent. Multi-factor risk scoring, risk matrices, mitigation planning, and risk trend tracking for pipeline deals.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 424 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: CardCollector

threads_created.title: Discussion: manifest design patterns
threads_created.content: Been thinking about manifest design patterns lately. What are your experiences? I'd love to hear how others in the community approach this.
threads_created.author: TierClimber

replies.author: RegistryRunner
replies.content: Good points. I've been thinking about this too. The single-file principle really changes how you approach manifest design patterns.
